title: Verify existing implementation of pagination helper
description: The pagination helper function already exists at src/services/pagination.ts with the exact required signature paginate<T>(items: T[], page: number, pageSize: number): { data: T[]; total: number; pages: number; hasNext: boolean }. Comprehensive tests exist in pagination.test.ts covering first/middle/last page, empty array, page size larger than array, error handling for invalid page/pageSize, mixed types, hasNext behavior, and page larger than total pages.
existing_patterns: src/services/pagination.ts uses generic function pattern consistent with utility modules in src/utils/
Co-located .test.ts files following the project's test pattern
